recommendations.description: Change discovery from describe_instance_profiles to describe_replication_instances. Instance profiles are different from replication instances. Metadata mapping confirms should use describe_replication_instances.
recommendations.impact: Fixes wrong resource type being checked

recommendations.description: Change discovery from describe_endpoint_types to describe_endpoints. describe_endpoint_types returns supported endpoint types, not actual endpoint configurations. Need describe_endpoints to check actual Redis endpoints with SSL mode.
recommendations.impact: Fixes wrong discovery - checking types instead of actual endpoints

recommendations.description: Fix field paths - after items_for, fields are directly on item, not item.Endpoints. Should be item.EngineName and item.SslMode.

Enhance logging validation - currently only checks if ReplicationTaskSettings exists, but doesn't verify logging is actually enabled. Need to check specific logging configuration fields (e.g., CloudWatchLogGroupArn, EnableLogging) within ReplicationTaskSettings JSON.
recommendations.impact: Improves validation accuracy - ensures logging is actually enabled, not just that settings exist

recommendations.description: Verify if MultiAZ returns boolean true or string 'true'. Adjust value in condition accordingly.

validation_issues: Rule 2 uses wrong discovery - describe_instance_profiles instead of describe_replication_instances
Rule 3 uses wrong discovery - describe_endpoint_types instead of describe_endpoints
Rule 3 has wrong field paths - item.Endpoints.* instead of item.*
Rules 4 & 5 only check if settings exist, don't verify logging is enabled
Rule 1 value type needs verification (string vs boolean)

api_structure.describe_replication_instances: Returns ReplicationInstances[] - independent, no params needed
api_structure.describe_instance_profiles: Returns InstanceProfiles[] - different resource type (instance profiles vs replication instances)
api_structure.describe_endpoint_types: Returns SupportedEndpointTypes[] - supported endpoint types, not actual endpoints
api_structure.describe_replication_tasks: Returns ReplicationTasks[] - independent, no params needed

test_results.note: Execution successful with no errors, but all 205 checks failed. This indicates logic issues (wrong discoveries, insufficient validation) rather than structural errors. Once discoveries and validation logic are fixed, checks should pass/fail correctly.

issues: Value type verification needed - uses string 'true' but API may return boolean true
aws.dms.instance.dms_multi_az_enabled.recommendation: Verify API return type and adjust value accordingly

issues: Wrong discovery - uses describe_instance_profiles instead of describe_replication_instances
Checking wrong resource type - instance profiles vs replication instances
Need to verify if describe_replication_instances returns PubliclyAccessible field
aws.dms.instance.no_public_access_config.recommendation: Change to describe_replication_instances, verify field availability

issues: Wrong discovery - uses describe_endpoint_types (returns supported types) instead of describe_endpoints (returns actual endpoints)
Wrong field paths - item.Endpoints.EngineName/SslMode should be item.EngineName/SslMode after items_for
Checking endpoint types instead of actual endpoint configurations
aws.dms.resource.endpoint_redis_in_trans.recommendation: Change to describe_endpoints discovery, fix field paths

issues: Insufficient validation - only checks if ReplicationTaskSettings exists, doesn't verify logging is enabled
Need to check specific logging configuration fields within ReplicationTaskSettings JSON
aws.dms.resource.replication_task_source.recommendation: Enhance validation to check specific logging configuration (e.g., CloudWatchLogGroupArn, EnableLogging)

issues: Insufficient validation - only checks if ReplicationTaskSettings and ReplicationTaskArn exist, doesn't verify logging is enabled
ReplicationTaskArn check is redundant - ARN always exists if task exists
Need to check specific logging configuration fields within ReplicationTaskSettings JSON
aws.dms.resource.replication_task_target.recommendation: Enhance validation to check specific logging configuration, remove redundant ARN check
